title: The Adams spectral sequence for the image-of-𝐽 spectrum
journal: Transactions of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
We show that if we factor the long exact sequence in cohomology of a cofiber sequence of spectra into short exact sequences, then the 

  
    
      d
      2
    
    d_2
  

-differential in the Adams spectral sequence of any one term is related in a precise way to Yoneda composition with the 2-extension given by the complementary terms in the long exact sequence. We use this to give a complete analysis of the Adams spectral sequence for the connective image-of-

  
    J
    J
  

 spectrum, finishing a calculation that was begun by D. Davis [Bol. Soc. Mat. Mexicana (2) 20 (1975), pp. 6–11].
